schemaType.description: Primary schema.org @type for the page. Used to determine which JSON-LD properties are rendered.

dateModified.description: Date the content was last modified. Used in dateModified schema property.

keywords.description: Comma-separated list of keywords for the page. Used in schema keywords property.

articleSection.description: Article/content section category. Maps to schema.org articleSection.

wordCount.description: Approximate word count of the article. Maps to schema.org wordCount.

readingTimeMinutes.description: Estimated reading time in minutes. Rendered as ISO 8601 duration (e.g. PT8M) in timeRequired.

inLanguage.description: BCP 47 language code for the content (e.g. en, fr). Defaults to en.

noIndex.description: When true, sets robots meta to noindex. Also suppresses schema injection for the page.

featureList.description: Array of feature strings for SoftwareApplication schema. Each entry becomes a featureList item.
